utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these keys. Each of them has the appropriate subdetails: health_coverage covers both physical and mental health and includes a cost (though not fully itemized, it is still specified); property_coverage includes home/contents-equivalent items (business equipment, temporary accommodation) and a cost; travel_coverage includes multiple subcomponents and a cost; additional_services includes specific enhancements and a cost; total_budget provides both monthly and annual breakdowns, as well as other financial details. Therefore, all required items are present and reasonably detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan shows that the AI assistant selected the 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' for health (both physical and mental health), property (business equipment and temporary accommodation), and travel (adventure sports, global coverage, emergency support). Additionally, it included telemedicine services and global emergency coordination. From the ground-truth ratings, we can map these directly: 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' under physical health has a rating of 10, under mental health has a rating of 7, under property/home content coverage (InsurePlus Standard Coverage) has a rating of 10, and under mobility/travel insurance (InsurePlus Standard Plan) has a rating of 10. Telemedicine Services are listed with a rating of 10. Therefore, the ratings corresponding to the chosen items are 10, 7, 10, 10, and 10 respectively.
